settings.logoutModalDesc: You will need to log in again to access your account and verification data.

privacy.collectionContent1: We collect information to provide better, more secure services to all our users. This includes basic details necessary for account creation, such as your name, email address, and contact number.
privacy.collectionContent2: Additionally, to facilitate secure transactions, we collect necessary financial and payment verification data in compliance with strict regulatory standards. We do not store sensitive biometric data directly on our servers without explicit, revokable consent.
privacy.usageContent: Your data is strictly utilized to process transactions, verify identity to prevent fraud, and maintain the operational security of your TrustPay account.
privacy.usagePoint1: To verify your identity and protect against malicious activities.
privacy.usagePoint2: To communicate critical account alerts and security updates.
privacy.usagePoint3: To comply with international financial regulations and compliance frameworks.
privacy.sharingContent: TrustPay does not sell your personal data to third parties. We only share specific verification tokens with authorized merchants when you explicitly initiate a payment request. We may also share data with verified banking partners strictly for the purpose of clearing transactions or complying with legal subpoenas.
privacy.securityContent: We employ enterprise-grade encryption (AES-256) for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. Our infrastructure undergoes continuous automated security scanning and annual third-party penetration testing to ensure adherence to our "safety-first" operational protocol.
privacy.rightsDesc: You maintain complete control over your personal data. Depending on your jurisdiction (e.g., GDPR, CCPA), you have the right to:
privacy.right1: Request access to your stored data
privacy.right3: Request deletion of your account and data
privacy.questionsDesc: Our specialized privacy team is available 24/7 to assist you.

contact.title: Contact Support
contact.subtitle: Need assistance? Fill out the details below. We'll automatically lookup your transaction history and account details to resolve requests quickly.
contact.placeholderSubject: e.g. Refund request for order overpayment
contact.placeholderMessage: Explain your request or issue in detail here...
contact.errSubjectDesc: Please enter a brief subject for your request.
contact.errMessageDesc: Please write details about your issue or refund request.
contact.successDesc: We have received your request. Our support team will review and contact you via email shortly.
contact.failedDesc: Failed to send message. Please check your connection and try again.
